title: UAP News - 4 new reports
message:
1. Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
2. Harvard Astrophysicist Avi Loeb Decodes The Mysterious Blue Lights UAP Recorded By Apollo Astronauts On Moon

4. The US government finally admitted these UFO encounters are real
